title: [lora_l2.c:409] callback invocation with ret instead of size_t cast
description: At line 409, lora_rx_callback is invoked with ret (int) as the len parameter. The callback signature expects size_t. While ret is guaranteed positive at this point (checked at lines 351, 374, 393), passing an int where size_t is expected is a type mismatch. On 32-bit systems int and size_t may be different widths. Fix: cast ret to size_t: cb(rx_buf, (size_t)ret, rssi, snr, cb_user_data).
close_reason: Fixed: cast ret to (size_t) in callback invocation
